message:
feat(pt-common): Add IdentityQuality and extend ProcessIdentity for TOCTOU safety

- Add IdentityQuality enum (Full, NoBootId, PidOnly) for provenance tracking
- Extend ProcessIdentity with pgid, sid, and quality fields
- Add to_identity() helper to DeepScanRecord for action revalidation
- Add can_automate() method based on identity quality
- Compute identity_quality in deep_scan based on boot_id/starttime availability

This enables downstream action execution to detect PID reuse and apply
appropriate safety gates when identity quality is degraded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
